scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,app1,app2,app3,app4,shell -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w packages/app1" "npm run dev -w packages/app2" "npm run dev -w packages/app3" "npm run dev -w packages/app4" "sleep 3 && npm run dev -w packages/shell"
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/shared && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app1 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app2 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app3 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app4 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/shell
scripts.build:apps: NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app1 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app2 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app3 && NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w packages/app4
scripts.start: node scripts/assert-mf-ports-free.mjs && concurrently -n app1,app2,app3,app4,shell -c green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red "npm run start -w packages/app1" "npm run start -w packages/app2" "npm run start -w packages/app3" "npm run start -w packages/app4" "npm run start -w packages/shell"
scripts.prod: npm run services:stop && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/app1 && npm run typecheck -w packages/app2 && npm run typecheck -w packages/app3 && npm run typecheck -w packages/app4 && npm run typecheck -w packages/shell
